title: Flaky German Beef Tomato Stir-fry
description: A savory, kid-friendly German dish featuring tender beef and juicy tomatoes in a simple sauce that's perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.
instructions: Prepare the beef by trimming any fat and slicing into thin strips. Season with salt, pepper, and a pinch of red pepper flakes if using.
Dice the onions and chop the garlic finely. Thinly slice the tomatoes.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the sliced onions and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the beef to the skillet and stir-fry for about 5-7 minutes or until browned on all sides.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for an additional minute until fragrant. Add the diced tomatoes with their juices, salt, pepper, and any remaining red pepper flakes if using.
Cover the pan to allow a sauce to form. Reduce heat to low and simmer gently for about 10 minutes or until most of the liquid has evaporated.
Remove from heat and serve hot as a side dish or main course.
